title: pyrus pluto
intro: Pyrus pluto, also known as the Korean mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Korea and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus pluto are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. Pyrus pluto can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
